productDescription: Fatty alcohol blend (C16-C18), cosmetic grade, derived from palm kernel oil. Used as emollient, emulsifier, and thickener in lotions and creams.
comment: SAMPLE: RSPO mass-balance certified palm kernel oil. LUC emissions included based on PACT methodology.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Palm kernel oil fractionation, hydrogenation, distillation, pelletizing.

productDescription: Polydimethylsiloxane (PDMS) fluid, 350 centistoke viscosity, cosmetic grade. Used as skin conditioning agent, emollient, and hair smoothing ingredient.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Silicon metal production, methylchlorosilane synthesis (Müller-Rochow process), hydrolysis, polymerization, viscosity adjustment, filtration.

productDescription: Fermentation-derived sodium hyaluronate, low molecular weight (50-100 kDa), cosmetic grade. Key active for hydrating serums and anti-aging products.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Microbial fermentation (Streptococcus zooepidemicus), cell lysis, multi-stage filtration, ethanol precipitation, lyophilization, milling, sterile packaging.

productDescription: Refined glycerin, USP/EP grade, 99.7% purity, from palm oil splitting. Used as humectant and solvent in skin care formulations.
comment: SAMPLE: RSPO certified sustainable palm oil. Glycerin is a co-product of fatty acid production; allocation by economic value.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Palm oil fat splitting, glycerol water evaporation, distillation, bleaching, deodorization.

productDescription: Natural-identical vanilla fragrance compound for cosmetic applications, featuring vanillin, ethyl vanillin, and supporting aromatic molecules. IFRA compliant.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Aromatic raw material synthesis/extraction, blending, quality testing (GC-MS), filling, packaging.

productDescription: Cross-linked polyacrylic acid polymer (Carbomer 940), cosmetic grade. Used as gel thickener and emulsion stabilizer in skincare and haircare.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Acrylic acid polymerization, cross-linking, solvent stripping, drying, milling, sieving, packaging in moisture-barrier bags.

productDescription: Rutile titanium dioxide, surface-treated (alumina/simethicone coated), micronized to 250nm. UV filter and white pigment for sunscreens and foundations.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Ilmenite ore chloride process, TiO2 precipitation, calcination (rutile phase), surface treatment, micronization, packaging.

productDescription: dl-alpha-Tocopheryl acetate, synthetic, cosmetic grade. Antioxidant and skin-conditioning agent for serums, creams, and lip care.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Isophytol synthesis, trimethylhydroquinone production, condensation, acetylation, purification, drumming.

productDescription: Sodium laureth sulfate, 2 EO, 70% active, from coconut-derived lauryl alcohol. Primary surfactant for shampoos, shower gels, facial cleansers.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Coconut oil splitting, lauryl alcohol distillation, ethoxylation, sulfation, neutralization, dilution to 70% active.

productDescription: Refined shea butter (Butyrospermum parkii), deodorized, bleached, cosmetic grade. Emollient and skin barrier ingredient for body butters and lip balms.
comment: SAMPLE: Shea nuts wild-harvested by women's cooperatives in Ghana. Global Shea Alliance sustainability certified.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Shea nut collection (West Africa), kernel extraction, traditional/mechanical pressing, degumming, refining, bleaching, deodorizing, drumming.

productDescription: Proprietary peptide active complex (palmitoyl tripeptide-1 + palmitoyl tetrapeptide-7) in butylene glycol carrier, 100ppm active. For anti-aging serums.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Solid-phase peptide synthesis, HPLC purification, lyophilization, reconstitution in carrier solvent, sterile filtration, filling.

productDescription: Pre-formulated self-emulsifying wax base (cetearyl alcohol, PEG-20 stearate, glyceryl stearate), for O/W cream formulations. Simplifies manufacturing.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Fatty alcohol procurement, PEG stearate synthesis, blending at controlled temperature, flaking/prilling, packaging.

productDescription: Pre-dispersed mineral color blend (iron oxides, TiO2, mica) in isododecane/dimethicone carrier. Ready-to-use for foundation manufacturing.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Pigment procurement, bead milling/dispersion, quality control (color matching, particle size), filling.

productDescription: Alcohol-free fragrance concentrate, floral bouquet profile (rose, jasmine, ylang ylang notes), for eau de parfum dilution. IFRA 51st Amendment compliant.
comment: SAMPLE: Contains naturals from responsible sourcing programs. Synthetic musks are biodegradable alternatives.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Natural essential oil extraction (steam distillation, solvent extraction), aroma chemical synthesis, precision blending, maturation, QC (GC-MS, olfactory panel), filling.

productDescription: Semi-finished lipstick bullet (wax/oil/pigment), classic bullet shape, ready for assembly into packaging. Various shades available.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Wax/oil melting, pigment dispersion (triple roller milling), mass compounding, molding into bullet shape, flame treatment, visual inspection.

productDescription: Extruded cosmetic pencil core, kohl/eyeliner formula (waxes, iron oxide, carbon black), waterproof. Ready for encasing in wood barrel.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Wax/binder melting, pigment dispersion, hot-melt extrusion, cooling, cutting to length, inspection.

productDescription: Airless pump dispenser, 50mL capacity, PP/PE materials, for serum and cream products. Includes pump, collar, and base.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: PP/PE injection molding (pump, piston, bottle, base), spring insertion, assembly, leak testing, bulk packaging.

productDescription: Premium glass perfume bottle, 100mL, extra-flint glass, automated blow-molding, fire-polished. Ready for filling and crimping.
comment: SAMPLE: Oxy-fuel furnace with waste heat recovery. 40% recycled cullet content.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Glass batch mixing, furnace melting (oxy-fuel), gob forming, blow molding, annealing, fire polishing, inspection, palletizing.

productDescription: Squeezable cosmetic tube, 75mL, 50% post-consumer recycled PE, offset-printed, with flip-top cap. For creams, lotions, and cleansers.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: PCR-PE compounding, tube extrusion, offset printing (up to 8 colors), cap injection molding, assembly, leak testing, shrink-wrapping.

productDescription: Semi-finished pressed powder compact (talc, mica, silica, pigments), wet-pressed into standard 59mm pan. For face powder and bronzer products.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Dry ingredient blending, binder solution preparation, wet blending, pressing into metal pans, drying, surface inspection.

productDescription: Anti-aging facial serum with 1.5% hyaluronic acid in lightweight aqueous gel. 30mL glass dropper bottle with FSC-certified carton.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Ingredient batching, aqueous gel compounding, homogenization, filling into glass dropper bottle, cartoning, case packing.

productDescription: Full-coverage, long-wear liquid foundation, 30mL glass bottle with pump. SPF10. Oil-free formula. 40 shades.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Pigment dispersion, emulsion compounding, high-shear mixing, deaeration, filling, pump assembly, cartoning.

productDescription: Iconic floral-aldehyde eau de parfum, 100mL. Luxury glass bottle with beveled edges, stopper cap, and gift-quality outer carton.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Fragrance concentrate preparation, alcohol purification, maceration, chilling filtration, filling, crimping, labeling, cellophane wrapping, luxury cartoning.

productDescription: High-protection sunscreen lotion, SPF50+ PA++++, WetForce technology, lightweight texture. 50mL plastic tube.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: UV filter dispersion, emulsion compounding, homogenization, tube filling, cap assembly, cartoning.

productDescription: Concentrated vitamin B3 serum with zinc PCA for blemish-prone skin. 30mL glass dropper bottle, minimalist packaging.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Active ingredient dissolution, pH adjustment, filtration, filling into glass dropper bottle, labeling, cartoning.

productDescription: Creamy matte lipstick, 3g net weight, full-coverage, in signature black bullet case with magnetic closure.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Wax/oil/pigment compounding, triple roller milling, molding, flame treatment, case assembly, labeling, cartoning.

productDescription: Moisturizing beauty bar, 100g, 1/4 moisturizing cream, mild cleansing. Wrapped in recycled paperboard.

productDescription: Nourishing shampoo for dry hair, 250mL, sulfate-free formula. PET bottle with 50% PCR content, flip-top cap.
